title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§515. Budget to include additional salary

           The governing authority of each of the parishes composing the Twenty-Third Judicial District shall annually, and at the time it prepares its general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed in R.S. 16:514.
doc_text:
§515.  Budget to include additional salary
The governing authority of each of the parishes composing the
Twenty-Third Judicial District shall annually, and at the time it prepares its
general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed
in R.S. 16:514.
